{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320171601518784E8EC3C09BACA87"}"},"total":12},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618045872834478910","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"优秀的新颖的灵魂出窍，互换故事，脉络朴实细腻，看了捧腹大笑，太好看了，真的值得推荐大家一起看看，作者大大加油！[偷笑][偷笑][偷笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773719198,"group_id":"7316140395862166590","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个幸福快乐的小毛孩，最近发现很多好看的小说，分享在我的。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8/dRhN3VODfflxf3q5XwmIi0/w1OfZ27scQs6uBhcw3","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/66481a561d574458b488fed923517dbc~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534622&x-signature=uZ9IPyYthAl%2Fk41vmozmGJeis5E%3D","user_id":"1676132607603160","user_name":"毛点点小混混"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1676132607603160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7316140395862166590","book_info":{"abstract":"（灵魂互换，文风轻松搞笑诙谐幽默，乃解压不二之选！）
实习期间，我背地里骂女总裁是母老虎，还扬言要睡她，让她给我生一堆儿子。
不幸被她正好听到。 
下一秒，我被当场开除。
再睁眼——
我成了她！
她成了我！ 
看着自己胸前的波澜，以及下身的小蕾丝，我陷入沉思。
“我兄弟呢？！谁把我兄弟弄没了？”
而她顶着我的身体，崩溃尖叫： 
从此，高冷女总被迫弓腰走螃蟹步。
而我用她的身体，给我自己转正又加薪。
女总：你无耻！
我：别闹，先把裤子脱了，不然一会儿又尿了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7a4b0ee9001d60a545ff21fdc05ddf76~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"崔萌","author_id":"","book_id":"7316140395862166590","book_name":"完蛋！灵魂互换了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3991人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":831,"name":"灵魂互换","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=831&name=灵魂互换&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7316144838502515262","read_count":"3991","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"260951"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"108","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,多女主,校花,灵魂互换","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/96ab823258988371d760f8849c089b37~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182161&x-signature=CYgsigQPnbybM4UCiy7VsS%2BdbnM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109801435865","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320171601518784E8EC3C09BACA87"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8},"user_action":{"author":0,"a
